short.en: A small yard between the house, the shed and the garden.
short.cs: Malý dvorek mezi domem, kůlnou a zahradou.

long.en: A small, sunny yard with a path of flat stones in the middle. A washing line hangs between two posts. The house smells like fresh bread. A little gate leads south to the fields.
long.cs: Malý slunečný dvorek a uprostřed cestička z plochých kamenů. Mezi dvěma kůly visí šňůra na prádlo. U cestičky zobe slepice. Z domu voní čerstvý chleba. Malá vrátka vedou na jih do polí.
